name: Pint + Jigger
tagline: Kaimuki's craft cocktail gastropub — serious drinks, creative pub food, and the best happy hour in the neighborhood.
mustOrder: bartender's choice cocktail — they're creative and skilled
pork belly sliders — crispy and rich
talkStory: Opened in 2013 by Dave Newman and Jason Higa, Pint + Jigger was the first serious craft cocktail bar on Waialae Ave and helped ignite Kaimuki's restaurant boom. Newman trained at some of NYC's top cocktail bars before returning home to Hawaii. The 'bartender's choice' is the power move -- tell them what spirits you like and they'll build something custom. Their annual anniversary party is one of Honolulu's best industry nights.
